name: Rugved
bio: Rugved is a dedicated Claude engineer at Alphabyte AI. He leads MCP server development, context engineering, agentic system design, and Claude Code delivery across client engagements. Trained through Anthropic Academy, he brings deep, hands-on expertise with the Claude model family.

His work spans the full Claude integration stack — from building custom MCP servers that connect Claude to internal tools and databases, to designing multi-agent orchestration patterns that run reliably in production environments.

credentials.keyCoursework: AI Systems · Distributed Computing · Software Design · Natural Language Processing · Systems Programming

achievements: Certified through Anthropic Academy for Claude engineering
Built production MCP servers connecting Claude to enterprise data systems
Designed agentic workflows deployed across multiple client engagements

footerBio.name: Alphabyte AI
footerBio.description: The Claude-focused practice of Alphabyte Solutions. Mid-market AI from the ground up — citizen development, executive enablement, MCP integration, and autonomous agents.
